expectations.text: Explains that colab exec -f reads local files (relative to CWD), not remote VM files
expectations.evidence: Lines 5-7: "colab exec -f reads a local file from the machine you're running the command on. It does not read a file from the remote Colab VM."

expectations.text: Shows correct command: colab exec -f script.py (without /content/ prefix)
Mentions that working directory on the VM is /content/
expectations.evidence: References /content/script.py as the VM path but never explicitly states the VM working directory is /content/

expectations.text: Mentions stdin pipe as alternative: echo 'code' | colab exec
expectations.evidence: No mention of stdin pipe or echo '...' | colab exec anywhere in the output
